hero_headline_scale: mixed — huge first name, smaller subtitle underneath
nav_style: hamburger menu icon only (even on desktop)
card_style: hover-to-reveal — minimal at rest, details on hover
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: moderate — scale, shadow change, color transitions
cursor_effect: magnetic effect — buttons slightly attract cursor on hover
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
quirk: skills are shown as a visual tag cloud, not a list
bonus_quirk: add a tiny animated element somewhere (spinning gear, blinking cursor, floating shape)
